summary: Frontend code review completed for Hotel Details/Booking UI improvements and payment header consistency across all booking pages. Code implementation verified - all features properly implemented. Session management issues prevented full E2E testing.

integration_issues.issue: User gets logged out when navigating from dashboard to service pages like /services/hotels. Likely cookie/auth token issue.

hotel_details_policies_card.details: Expandable card with check-in/check-out boxes at top (emerald/amber colored), 'Additional Policies' expandable toggle with data-testid='policies-toggle' implemented

hotel_details_oryno_services_nearby.details: Clickable filter buttons with nearbyServiceFilter state, data-testid='filter-{service}' attributes, active state styling with highlighted colors

hotel_booking_guest_toggle.details: Guest toggle area has bg-[#082c59]/5 background, Switch has className='data-[state=checked]:bg-[#082c59]'

hotel_booking_hotel_card.details: Shows check-in/check-out policy boxes (emerald/amber), expandable amenities (max 4 visible, +N more link), NO 'Selected Room' in this card (room selection shown in Booking Summary)

hotel_booking_summary.details: Header has bg-slate-400. Shows mini-cards: Guests (bg-blue-50), Duration/Nights (bg-indigo-50), Room Selected (bg-[#082c59]/5 with 'Your Selected Room' label)

payment_header_slate_400.details: All 9 booking pages have bg-slate-400 for payment section header

action_items: Investigate session management issue - users get logged out when navigating to service pages from dashboard
Verify UI changes visually once session issue is resolved
critical_code_review_comments: All requested UI features are correctly implemented in code
Session/auth issue may be related to cookie settings or redirect handling on protected routes

success_rate.frontend: Code Review: 100%, E2E Testing: Incomplete due to session issues

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Hotel Details/Booking UI changes implemented correctly per code review. Payment header slate-400 verified in all 9 booking pages. Session management issue prevents full E2E testing - user gets logged out when navigating from dashboard to service pages. Main agent should investigate auth/session handling for service routes.
